chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 61 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Maqsood Ali Mangi, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No objection statement stands filed on part of respondent No.1 as to the transfer of hearing of the bail application required in the matter. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General finds no room to make any comments on account of consent of the parties. Accordingly, in view of the no objection extended, although comments have not been received as ordered on an earlier date from the concerned Court, let the hearing of Criminal Bail Application No.2627 of 2025 “Nizakat Ali Mangi v. The State” be heard by any other relevant Presiding Officer other than 4th Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur for the required conclusion in accordance with law. Transfer application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
